case_title: MAURICIO CARMELO SOLANO VS. EMILIA SANCHEZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MAURICIO CARMELO SOLANO IS NOT PRESENT. MICHELE MINSUK, COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER APPEARS TO PROVIDE SPANISH INTERPRETATION SERVICE TO PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT EMILIA SANCHEZ DBA EL CAPITAN TAQUERIA & GRILL IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE.
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF SOLANO, MAURICIO CARMELO

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS: BAD ADDRESS. UNABLE TO LOCATE ANY BUILDING WITH 1988 FOLSOM AS THEIR ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOLANO, MAURICIO CARMELO AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, EMILIA DBA EL CAPITAN TAQUERIA & GRILL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,679.00 FILED BY SOLANO, MAURICIO CARMELO AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, EMILIA DBA EL CAPITAN TAQUERIA & GRILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **NO SIGNATURE** SERVED MAR-21-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, EMILIA DBA EL CAPITAN TAQUERIA & GRILL
CERTIFIED MAILING OF SC-100 RECD 3/22/22 **NO SIGNATURE** FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOLANO, MAURICIO CARMELO AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, EMILIA DBA EL CAPITAN TAQUERIA & GRILL
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOLANO, MAURICIO CARMELO

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (ENVELOPE & CONTENTS RECEIVED **WITHOUT** GREEN CERTIFIED MAIL CARD) COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, EMILIA DBA EL CAPITAN TAQUERIA & GRILL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-28-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MAURICIO CARMELO SOLANO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA. DEFENDANT EMILIA SANCHEZ DBA EL CAPITAN TAQUERIA & GRILL IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED THE ASSISTANCE OF A SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
